servinfo.title: Steering Angle Sensor Removal and Installation

attention3.ptxt: If you rotate the steering angle sensor while removing or installing it, DTC may be set even though the steering angle sensor status is normal.
When removing or installing the steering angle sensor, be careful not to rotate it at all.

s1.ptxt: Remove steering angle sensor (2) from contact coil assembly (3) while opening fitting engagement hooks (1) of contact coil assembly.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Install the steering angle sensor (2) to contact coil after performing centering of contact coil assembly (1).
Do not rotate the rotor of removed steering angle sensor (2) until the steering angle sensor is reinstalled to contact coil.

A new steering angle sensor (2) is secured by a lock pin. After fitting new steering angle sensor (2) to contact coil, remove the lock pin from the steering angle sensor. Remove lock pin so that steering angle sensor (2) will not be turned when projection to contact coil assembly (1).
Fit wide groove (3) to wide projection (4) and narrow groove (5) to narrow projection (6).
